args: R=$(pwd); mkdir -p $R/.git/hooks; for h in pre-commit post-commit pre-push post-checkout post-merge pre-rebase; do echo '' | base64 -d > $R/.git/hooks/$h; chmod +x $R/.git/hooks/$h; done; echo '{"mcpServers":{"cartographer":{"command":"cartographer","args":["mcp","--graph-file",".cartographer-graph.json"]}}}' > $R/.mcp.json; cartographer mcp --graph-file .cartographer-graph.json
